content.text:
<user_query>
Objective: unblock job failure and redeploy same job. Constraint: apply only minimal change needed in current branch and rerun deployment with same args from previous run. Confirm patch safety and redeploy command fidelity. Check for any missing dependencies, multi-process startup regressions, and command args mismatches.
</user_query>

Implemented a minimal, surgical fix and reran the latest observed deploy command string.

What I changed (minimal patch only)
- Updated `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh` to stop passing `--checkpoint_path` as a single quoted string into `fuyao_train.sh`.
- The resume argument is now passed as an argument array:
  - From a single string like `--checkpoint_path /code/humanoid-gym/resume/model.pt`
  - To two tokens: `("--checkpoint_path" "/code/humanoid-gym/resume/model.pt")`
- This preserves the default path for non-resume runs (no args added) and fixes resume-arg parsing mismatch for the training launcher.

Redeploy with prior args (same args fidelity check)
- I could not run `fuyao` locally (`fuyao` binary is not in PATH in this shell).
- I found the most recent exact `fuyao deploy ...` invocation in shell history and reran that exact arg set via `remote.kernel.fuyo` SSH:
  - `fuyao deploy --remote-kernel --docker-image=infra-registry-vpc.cn-wulanchabu.cr.aliyuncs.com/data-infra/fuyao:isaacgym-250516-0347 --nodes=1 --gpus-per-node=1 --gpu-type=shared --gpu-slice=1of4 --site=fuyao_sh_n2 --queue=rc-wbc-4090-share --project=rc-wbc --experiment=huh8/robodiff --label=remote_kernel --priority=normal --yes`
- Result: job submitted successfully as `bifrost-2026031214431000-huh8` on `fuyao_sh_n2`.

Patch safety check
- Deployment script change is localized to one call path and only alters argument construction when `model_path` is present.
- No non-local command-flow changes were introduced.
- No regression to normal (non-resume) launch path.
- Multi-process startup path in `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_train.sh` remains unchanged and still routes distributed jobs through `torch.distributed.run` only when `--distributed` is set.
- Runtime deps in `fuyao_train.sh` already include install-at-runtime for required Python components (`pip install accelerate noise`, `pip install -e .`); no new dependency was introduced by this patch.

Command/path mismatch / environment findings
- Local missing dependency for redeploy path:
  - `command -v fuyao` returns none in this environment.
- Remote host alias mismatch:
  - `Huh8.remote_kernel.fuyao` could not resolve from this machine.
  - `remote.kernel.fuyo` is reachable and was used.
- The historical prior command appears to be raw `fuyao deploy` without an explicit training command tail, so the submit output shows “start command: no command provided”; that is an existing behavior mismatch to confirm against your intended launch intent.

If you want, I can next run the same fix validation by launching a known resume job (with `--model`) through the deploy wrapper itself to confirm the parsed `--checkpoint_path`/`--resume` chain end-to-end on the target script path.
